title: Spinner
description: Indeterminate progress: compact SVG ring with semantic color, extended size scale, and optional caption placement for inline buttons or centered shells.
intro: Use `labelPosition="none"` for icon-only chrome and set `ariaLabel` to describe the wait. Turn on `label` with a position when the spinner substitutes for a block of content. `variant` and `size` follow the same tokens as buttons so loading states stay visually aligned with surrounding actions.

featureSections.title: Label and aria
featureSections.description: The host always exposes a status announcement via `aria-label`. Pair a visible `label` with the same intent in `ariaLabel` so speech does not contradict the caption.

featureSections.title: Variant and size
featureSections.description: `variant` mirrors semantic palettes for neutral, success, warning, and danger contexts. `size` spans `extra-small` through `extra-large` for toolbars, forms, and empty regions.

featureSections.title: Label placement
featureSections.description: `before`, `after`, `above`, and `below` wrap the ring for tight rows or stacked hero loaders without custom flex wrappers.

featureSections.title: Primary action with wait
featureSections.description: Disable the committing control and reveal a small trailing spinner so users see work in flight. Mirror this pattern for publish, sync, or import.

featureSections.title: Section placeholder
featureSections.description: Center a large spinner inside a neutral frame when a panel has no data yet, then swap it for content when the request completes.

accessibility.title: Status and name
accessibility.body: Root uses `role="status"` with `aria-label` from `ariaLabel` or the shared i18n loading string. Prefer an explicit `ariaLabel` that names the task, such as `Saving draft` or `Fetching board`, instead of repeating the word loading everywhere.

accessibility.title: Visible label and busy context
accessibility.body:
Optional `label` text is visual only; it is not automatically referenced from `aria-labelledby`. Keep `ariaLabel` consistent with the caption when both are present.

| Pattern | Guidance |
| --- | --- |
| inline wait | nearby context may already explain the task |
| longer region load | pair spinner with status text or a busy container |
| keyboard | spinner is not interactive and should not be focusable |

apiSections.title: SpinnerComponent - ui-spinner
apiSections.lead: Purely presentational loading indicator; pair with disabled controls or replace skeleton regions until data resolves.

blocks.title: Inputs
rows: Caption; shown only when `labelPosition` is not `none` and text is non-empty.
Accessible name; falls back to the i18n loading string when empty.
